docs: Creates a new Simple DAO
# Panics
- `voting_period < 10`
- `quorum_bps` not in `100..=10000`
- `total_voting_power == 0`
- `max_active_proposals == 0`
constructors.label: new

docs: # Simple DAO - Governance Contract
A lightweight DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization) for BelizeChain.
Demonstrates cross-contract integration with DALLA token.
## Features
- Proposal creation with optional treasury transfer actions
- DALLA token-weighted voting
- Per-proposal total supply snapshot for quorum isolation
- Configurable voting periods with execution timelock
- Two-step admin transfer pattern
- Two-step code hash upgrade with timelock
- Proposal cancellation by proposer or admin
- Active proposal cap to prevent storage DoS
## Governance Security
- Voting locks: When a user votes, their DALLA tokens are locked via
cross-contract call until the proposal's voting period ends. This prevents
flash governance (C02) and double-voting via token transfer (H01).
- Proposal expiration: Passed proposals must be executed within the execution
window after the timelock expires, or they auto-expire.
Event emitted when a proposal is created
events.label: ProposalCreated

docs: Event emitted when a vote is cast
events.label: VoteCast

docs: Event emitted when a proposal is finalized
events.label: ProposalFinalized

docs: Event emitted when a proposal is executed
events.label: ProposalExecuted

docs: Event emitted when a proposal is cancelled
events.label: ProposalCancelled

docs: Event emitted when an admin transfer is proposed
events.label: AdminTransferProposed

docs: Event emitted when an admin transfer is completed
events.label: AdminTransferred

docs: Event emitted when a code hash upgrade is proposed
events.label: CodeHashUpgradeProposed

docs: Event emitted when a code hash upgrade is executed
events.label: CodeHashUpdated

docs: Event emitted when total voting power is updated
events.label: TotalVotingPowerUpdated

docs: Creates a new proposal
Requires the caller to be the admin or hold DALLA tokens above
`min_proposal_threshold`. Optionally includes a treasury transfer
that will be executed if the proposal passes.
messages.label: create_proposal

docs: Casts a vote on a proposal
Vote weight is determined by the caller's DALLA token balance
via cross-contract call — callers cannot self-report weight.
messages.label: vote

docs: Finalizes a proposal after voting period ends
Uses the per-proposal `total_supply_snapshot` for quorum calculation,
ensuring that admin changes to `total_voting_power` after proposal
creation do not affect existing proposals.
messages.label: finalize_proposal

docs: Executes a passed proposal after the timelock period
If the proposal includes a transfer target and value, the transfer
is dispatched after state is updated (CEI pattern).
messages.label: execute_proposal

docs: Cancels an active proposal
Only the original proposer or the admin can cancel a proposal.
Cancelled proposals cannot be finalized or executed.
messages.label: cancel_proposal

docs: Gets a proposal by ID
messages.label: get_proposal

docs: Gets the vote weight for an account on a proposal
messages.label: get_vote

docs: Gets the current proposal count
messages.label: proposal_count

docs: Gets the voting period
messages.label: voting_period

docs: Gets the quorum threshold
messages.label: quorum_threshold

docs: Sets the total voting power (admin only)
Changes only affect future proposals — existing proposals retain
their creation-time snapshot.
messages.label: set_total_voting_power

docs: Gets the total voting power
messages.label: total_voting_power

docs: Gets the DALLA token address
messages.label: dalla_token_address

docs: Proposes an admin transfer (two-step pattern)
The new admin must call `accept_admin()` to complete the transfer.
messages.label: transfer_admin

docs: Accepts a pending admin transfer
Must be called by the account set as `pending_admin`.
messages.label: accept_admin

docs: Gets the admin address
messages.label: admin

docs: Gets the pending admin address
messages.label: pending_admin

docs: Gets the timelock duration in blocks
messages.label: timelock_blocks

docs: Gets the current active proposal count
messages.label: active_proposal_count

docs: Gets the maximum active proposals allowed
messages.label: max_active_proposals

docs: Gets the minimum proposal threshold
messages.label: min_proposal_threshold

docs: Gets the execution window in blocks
messages.label: execution_window

docs: Gets the currently proposed code hash (if any)
messages.label: proposed_code_hash

docs: Proposes a code hash upgrade (admin only, requires timelock)
The upgrade cannot be executed until `timelock_blocks` have passed.
This gives the community time to observe and react.
messages.label: propose_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Executes a previously proposed code hash upgrade after timelock
messages.label: execute_code_hash_upgrade

docs: Cancels a pending code hash upgrade
messages.label: cancel_code_hash_upgrade
